subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Zaynu'l-Muqarrabin 3
subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath been presented before Our countenance, and that which was inscribed therein hath been mentioned and heard. God willing, may all thy days [3.5s]... ...And now concerning thy question whether human souls continue to be conscious one of another after their separation from the body
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت لدی الوجه حاضر آنچه مسطور مذکور آمد و شنیده شد انشاء الله همیشه ایام
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation, @soul; spirit after death, @Christ; Christianity, @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
